a: JunoTalk is a multilingual encrypted communication platform featuring AI-powered real-time voice translation, end-to-end encrypted messaging, HD video calls, and global eSIM data. No phone number required.
JunoTalk supports real-time translation across 50+ languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Arabic, Hindi, Portuguese, and more.
End-to-end encryption means only the sender and recipient can read messages — not the service provider. JunoTalk uses E2EE for all direct messages and video calls.

q: What is a JunoTalk room code?
a: A JunoTalk room code is a 6-character code that lets anyone join a chat room instantly without needing an account or phone number.
An eSIM is a digital SIM card embedded in your device. JunoTalk offers travel eSIM data plans, letting you stay connected worldwide without swapping physical SIM cards.
